summary: Executed backend regression (8 pytest cases) and frontend Phase-2 workflow validation on public URL. Core global filters, analytics drill-down, compare deep-linking, CSV exports, and company detail guided navigation work. One compare-entry regression and media quality issues found.

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking 'Add to compare' lands on /compare without prefilled company selection; deep-link intent is lost.

integration_issues.issue: CompanyCard links with query key `left`, but Compare page only reads/writes `c1` and `c2`; URL state gets normalized to empty and selected company is dropped.

issues: Multiple company logo URLs return 404 or are blocked (ORB), causing broken/empty visuals in card headers.
Analytics route emits repeated Recharts width/height warning logs (`width(-1), height(-1)`), indicating chart sizing instability during render transitions.

action_items: Align compare deep-link contract across app: either map CompanyCard link to /compare?c1={id} or make ComparePage also accept `left`/`right` aliases.
Add fallback/validated logo handling for external URLs that 404 or are blocked.
Review analytics chart container sizing to remove repeated width/height warnings and avoid noisy console/perf degradation.
critical_code_review_comments: `CompanyCard` uses `/compare?left=...` while `ComparePage` state contract is `c1/c2`; this contract mismatch breaks entry-point state restoration.
ComparePage `useEffect` writes search params from local state and can wipe unsupported incoming params immediately, masking invalid deep links instead of preserving/intelligently mapping them.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated required Phase-2 flows on https://talent-compass-52.preview.emergentagent.com: analytics drill-down query sync, open filtered explorer, explore/categories global filter persistence, compare shareable URL refresh restore, comparison/export CSV downloads, and company detail sticky jump/progress behavior. Remaining failure is specifically Explore card compare CTA state handoff.
rca of the issue: Reproduction: (1) Open /explore, click first 'Add to compare' button. (2) Observe navigation to /compare with no selected company. RCA: CompanyCard generates `/compare?left=<id>` while ComparePage initializes from `c1/c2` only (`searchParams.get('c1')`, `searchParams.get('c2')`). Next effect writes params back from empty state, removing unknown query keys. Mitigation: normalize query contracts (single source: c1/c2) and optionally alias legacy params before write-back.
